mapper.select: SELECT HOUR(entry_time) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM parking_record WHERE DATE(entry_time) = #{date} GROUP BY HOUR(entry_time) ORDER BY hour

SELECT DATE(entry_time) as date, COUNT(*) as entryCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as exitCount, COALESCE(SUM(paid_amount), 0) as revenue FROM parking_record WHERE DATE(entry_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(entry_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT a.area_name as areaName, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(r.paid_amount), 0) as revenue FROM parking_record r LEFT JOIN parking_space s ON r.space_id = s.space_id LEFT JOIN parking_area a ON s.area_id = a.area_id WHERE DATE(r.entry_time) = CURDATE() GROUP BY a.area_id
